title: Device Home Screen - Starting app with one connected Headset
scenario: Connected headset not displayed in device list on Poly Studio Mobile app home screen when app is launched with device already paired
steps: 1. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is already paired and connected to the Android device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the Home screen device list.
expected: The connected headset is displayed in the device list on the Home screen.
